rect.style: fill: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(168, 168, 168), rgb(168, 168, 168));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 125px; height: 1px; padding-top: 107px; margin-left: 143px;
